title: Aggregate Operations in SQL
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of applying aggregate functions to groups of data within a relational database management system.
elements: Aggregate Function (e.g., SUM, AVG, COUNT, MAX, MIN)
relationships: Table Data is grouped by a specified attribute(s) via GROUP BY
Aggregate Function is calculated for each group
Groups are filtered by a condition on the aggregate result via HAVING
Final aggregated Result Set is returned
